kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09A. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09A" and put them into a temporary table called J09A_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU". There are four additional overrides that always result in "EVU": houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is 0, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 500 and 599, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 900 and 999, and houses located in the areas of Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld.

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

There is one more classification to handle: check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024 (based on Record created on). For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING".

Export the MANDATORY_READING entries separately as a CSV file named "J09A_MANDATORY_READING" with these columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`. Send that file to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com.

Then export all remaining entries (everything except MANDATORY_READING) as a CSV file named "J09A" with the same columns. Send that to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_temp; CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT; UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') THEN 'EVU' WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09A_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." TEXT; UPDATE J09A_temp SET "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = (SELECT e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM eablg e WHERE e.Installation = J09A_temp.ANLAGE LIMIT 1); ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN TITLE TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN FORENAME TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN SURNAME TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN STREET TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN STREETNO TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN POST_CODE1_CONTACT INTEGER; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN CITY1_CONTACT TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN CITY2_CONTACT TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN EMAIL TEXT; UPDATE J09A_temp SET TITLE = (SELECT s.TITLE FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), FORENAME = (SELECT s.FORENAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SURNAME = (SELECT s.SURNAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREET = (SELECT s.STREET FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREETNO = (SELECT s.STREETNO FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), POST_CODE1_CONTACT = (SELECT s.POST_CODE1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY1_CONTACT = (SELECT s.CITY1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY2_CONTACT = (SELECT s.CITY2 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), EMAIL = (SELECT s.EMAIL FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1); UPDATE J09A_temp SET TITLE = COALESCE(TITLE, (SELECT n.TITLE FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), FORENAME = COALESCE(FORENAME, (SELECT n.FORENAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), SURNAME = COALESCE(SURNAME, (SELECT n.SURNAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), STREET = COALESCE(STREET, (SELECT n.STREET FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), STREETNO = COALESCE(STREETNO, (SELECT n.STREETNO FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), POST_CODE1_CONTACT = COALESCE(POST_CODE1_CONTACT, (SELECT n.POST_CODE1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), CITY1_CONTACT = COALESCE(CITY1_CONTACT, (SELECT n.CITY1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), CITY2_CONTACT = COALESCE(CITY2_CONTACT, (SELECT n.CITY2 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), EMAIL = COALESCE(EMAIL, (SELECT n.EMAIL FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)); UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2); SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_rows FROM J09A_temp;

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_temp
CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT

UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') THEN 'EVU' WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09A_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." TEXT
UPDATE J09A_temp SET "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = (SELECT e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM eablg e WHERE e.Installation = J09A_temp.ANLAGE LIMIT 1)
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN TITLE TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN FORENAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN SURNAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN STREET TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN STREETNO TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN POST_CODE1_CONTACT INTEGER
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN CITY1_CONTACT TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN CITY2_CONTACT TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN EMAIL TEXT

UPDATE J09A_temp SET TITLE = (SELECT s.TITLE FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), FORENAME = (SELECT s.FORENAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SURNAME = (SELECT s.SURNAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREET = (SELECT s.STREET FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREETNO = (SELECT s.STREETNO FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), POST_CODE1_CONTACT = (SELECT s.POST_CODE1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY1_CONTACT = (SELECT s.CITY1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY2_CONTACT = (SELECT s.CITY2 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), EMAIL = (SELECT s.EMAIL FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)

UPDATE J09A_temp SET TITLE = COALESCE(TITLE, (SELECT n.TITLE FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), FORENAME = COALESCE(FORENAME, (SELECT n.FORENAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), SURNAME = COALESCE(SURNAME, (SELECT n.SURNAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), STREET = COALESCE(STREET, (SELECT n.STREET FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), STREETNO = COALESCE(STREETNO, (SELECT n.STREETNO FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), POST_CODE1_CONTACT = COALESCE(POST_CODE1_CONTACT, (SELECT n.POST_CODE1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), CITY1_CONTACT = COALESCE(CITY1_CONTACT, (SELECT n.CITY1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), CITY2_CONTACT = COALESCE(CITY2_CONTACT, (SELECT n.CITY2 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), EMAIL = COALESCE(EMAIL, (SELECT n.EMAIL FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1))

UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2)

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1_CONTACT AS POST_CODE1, CITY1_CONTACT AS CITY1, CITY2_CONTACT AS CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09A_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1_CONTACT AS POST_CODE1, CITY1_CONTACT AS CITY1, CITY2_CONTACT AS CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09A_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING'
